name: Lemon Herb Barbecued Shrimp Hbwk07a
recipeIngredient: 1/4 large lemon - seeded and finely minced, including the rind
1 tbsp Gravy Master or Kitchen Bouquet
2 lbs Large shrimp (20 - 25 count) - Shelled and deveined
Bamboo skewers - soaked in water for 30 minutes
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except shrimp in a small saucepan; simmer for 15 minutes, stirring frequently.
2. Thread shrimp, overlapping, onto skewers.
3. Grill the skewers 4 to 6 inches from hot glowing coals, turning and brushing with lemon mixture frequently, for 3 to 5 minutes.
4. Do not overcook.
Makes 6 to 8 servings.
